nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联130种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、小嘴穴䳍、绿翅雁等130种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴拿馬運河區
nodes.summary: 巴拿馬運河區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括青喉蜂鸟、Black-tailed trogon、Velvety manakin等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Purple-throated fruitcrow
nodes.summary: Purple-throated fruitcrow（Purple-throated fruitcrow，学名 Querula purpurata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于巴拿馬運河區、亞馬遜盆地、常綠森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: One population is found in Central America from southeastern Nicaragua south along the Caribbean side of Costa Rica and Panama and also on the Pacific side of Panama from the Canal Zone south

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: According to some sources it skirts a wide band of northern Amazonia. However, van Perlo's field guide shows the species occupying the entirety of the Amazon Basin. The purple-throated fruitcrow inhabits lowland evergreen forest in the tropical zone, where it prefers the forest's midstory to canopy.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
